stemHtml: Moving the CG of an aircraft forward will have what effect on the stall speed, VS?

options.a: V<sub>S</sub> decreases, due to an increase in critical angle of attack.
options.b: None, the CG position has NO influence of V<sub>S</sub>.
options.c: Equivalent to the effect of a decrease in mass.
options.d: Equivalent to the effect of an increase in mass.
